## Quick Start

```python
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

bundle = Path("rec_001_20260101T120000_export")

# Load signal CSV
df = pd.read_csv(bundle / "streams" / "signal.csv")

# Load NPZ
data = np.load(bundle / "streams" / "signal.npz")
```
